epigraph.quote: Oh lord, let the grapeshot, like the prize money, be scattered mainly among the officers.....

per_stop.quote: There were ladies in Hats & lots & lots of naval uniforms encrusted with gold & children at a local naval school.
We met a family who said that they had been visiting for 30 years, but never seen High Force so covered in water.
Tonic got hit by a red lorry. I carried him back to the house. He gradually seems to have recovered.
